title: Tunisian Date Crises
description: A sweet and crispy dessert inspired by the flavors of Tunisia, featuring caramelized dates and a crunchy topping. This nostalgic treat is perfect for warm weather gatherings.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Arrange the dates on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake the dates for 15-20 minutes, or until caramelized.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and salt.
Add the unsalted butter and mix until a crumbly mixture forms.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg and vanilla extract.
Add the egg mixture to the flour mixture and stir until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Cut the dough into desired shapes using a cookie cutter.
Bake the cookies for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
Allow the cookies to cool completely on a wire rack.
Crush the crispy rice cereal into fine crumbs.
Dip the tops of the cookies into the crushed cereal for a crunchy topping.
Serve the cookies warm, topped with caramelized dates.
